creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Bring up to date ports/151318 :
- minor conflicts
- remove explicit PORTREVISION=0 in slave ports
- restore new port header (1st line) in cl-stumpwm to be stumpwm
- replace patches with exact versions upstream

Fix: 

Commit the ports in
svn co https://svn.redports.org/aoeui
and remove x11-wm/stumpwm
